notes: FULL VLA DATA PIPELINE END-TO-END VALIDATED. Scripted demos -> Mimic annotate -> Mimic generate -> LeRobot conversion all working. Concrete artifacts: datasets/teleop/cube_scripted_clean.hdf5 (23 demos), datasets/teleop/cube_annotated.hdf5 (16 demos with datagen_info), datasets/mimic/cube_mimic_smoke.hdf5 (20 Mimic-generated demos, 1605 steps each), datasets/lerobot/cube_pick_smoke (2-episode LeRobot v3 test conversion — loads cleanly as LeRobotDataset with observation.state/ee_pose/cube_pos/images.{wrist,third_person}/action features). Key pipeline justfile recipes: scripted-pick num=N, mimic-annotate, mimic-generate num=N, inspect-demos, to-lerobot. Remaining phase 11+ work: (a) scale mimic-generate to ~750 trials for a production training corpus (~2-4 hours on L40S); (b) run to-lerobot on the full output; (c) LoRA-finetune SmolVLA per the plan's Phase 11. Known Mimic caveat: generation_num_trials mode in Isaac Lab appears to stop early once enough successes accumulate (smoke got 20/20 and exited even though the intermediate log showed 12/24 at mid-run). Dataset hygiene utility /tmp/clean_demos.py drops demos with <100 action steps and preserves /data attrs — should become a proper script later.
